name: backend-microservices-workspace
description: Backend workspace with Fastify microservices, gRPC, and Prisma

scripts.setup: cd services/auth && npm install && cd ../bank-account && npm install
scripts.prisma:generate: cd services/auth && npx prisma generate && cd ../bank-account && npx prisma generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd services/auth && npx prisma migrate dev && cd ../bank-account && npx prisma migrate dev
